english translation text: Yaha'n sambhal kar qadam uthanaTake extra care when you take a step here
yeh karbala hai, yeh karbala hai..For this is Karbala, this is Karbala

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh baat hargiz na bhul jaanaNever forget this message…
Yeh Karbala Hai

english translation text: Jahan e sabr o reza yehi hai, Khuda e sabr o reza yaheen hai The epitome of patience and submission is right here
Yaha'n pe aate hai chalke Mehdi, Behisht e zahra ye sar zamee'n haiImam Mahdi (A.S.) walks to this land; this land is Zahra’s (A.S.) paradise

urdu transliteration text:
Yaha'n hai zahra ka aana janaZahra (A.S.) keeps visiting this land frequently…
Yeh Karbala Hai

english translation text: Duaein denge hussain tumko, yaha'n pe aansu agar bahayeImam Hussain (A.S.) will pray for you himself, should you shed tears on this land…
Jaha'n pe beti ne bewatan ki, sitamgaro se tamache khayeWhere the daughter of a homeless person was slapped by treacherous people

urdu transliteration text:
Yaha'n pe khushiyo ko bhul jaanaForget your happiness here…
Yeh Karbala Hai

english translation text: Yaha'n pe guzri hai wo qayamat, mila na usko sukoon ab takOn this land, the earth was shattered, such that he has still not found peace…
Ridaein chinne ke ghum mein abid, lahad mein rota hai khoon ab takFor the sorrow of the ladies losing their veils, Aabid still cries with tears of blood from his grave
Yaha'n pe hargiz na muskuranaDo not smile at this place…
Yaha'n pe hurr bhi tha hurmala bhi, kitabe hasti ko padhke dekhoOn this land there was Hurr, as well as Hurmala, if only you read the book of personalities
Sada e halmin jo aa rahi hai, tum is taraf ho ya us taraf ho The call of Halmin is still being heard, are you on the side of good or evil?
Tumhe amal se hai ab batanaYou can answer this call only by your actions…
Kahi'n pe qasim hue hai tukde, kahi'n pe zee'n se gire the maulaSomewhere on this land Qasim was cut into pieces, somewhere Maula (Hussain A.S.) fell from his horse
Kahi'n sakina sumo se lipti, kahi'n pe asghar ne teer khayaSomewhere on this land Sakina held on to the hooves (of Zuljanah), somewhere Asghar was shot by an arrow
Yahi’n ghareebi ka hai thikanaThis is a land of misfortunes

urdu transliteration text:
Sawari aayegi ek waha'n se, najaf ki janib nigaah rakhnaThere is a horse rider coming, if you look towards Najaf
Yeh Karbala Hai

english translation text: Jab aaye shame ghariba'n jis dum, Ali ko zainab ka pursa denaThe moment Shaam-e-gharibaan dawns upon us, give Zainab’s condolences to her father Ali (A.S)

urdu transliteration text:
Tum aansuo ke diye jalanaPrepare lanterns with your tears…
Yeh Karbala Hai

english translation text: Kisi ke dil mein lagi hai barchi, kisi ke baazu kate yehi parSomeones heart was pierced with a spear; someones arms were chopped here
Haye ali ki beti ke kitne Yusuf,  lahu mein doobe hai is zamee'n par Alas! How many Yusuf’s of Zainab, have been drenched in blood on this land?
Luta hai sadaat ka gharanaAlas! How many Yusuf’s of Zainab, have been drenched in blood on this land?
Rahe kahi'n bhi jaha'n mein jakar, hussain wale ye jaante haiWhere ever we live on this planet, the lovers of Hussain (A.S) know..
Hum ehle matam ke dil takallum,  yaha'n ki mitti se hi bane hai We are the people who do Maatam and our hearts are made with the dust of this land (Karbala)
Yaha'n hai wapas palatke aanaWe will eventually come back to this land…
